requirement_topic.en: TISI Product Certification for Listed Electrical Products
requirement_topic.zh: TISI 列入产品的电气产品认证
requirement_topic.zht: TISI 列入產品的電氣產品認證

summary.en: Thailand requires Thai Industrial Standards Institute (TISI) conformity pathways for listed electrical products before market entry. Heat pumps and air-source heat pump AC sold in Thailand are typically expected to complete TISI conformity checks and carry TIS-compliant markings where required. Relevant safety basis is linked to TIS IEC 60335-2-40 implementation, and import documentation must show responsible importer obligations and applicable declarations at the unit level.
summary.zh: 泰国要求在市场准入前对列入目录的电气产品执行TISI合规路径。进入泰国销售的空气源热泵及其空调形式通常需要完成TISI符合性检查并在要求时使用TIS合规标识。相关安全基础与TIS IEC 60335-2-40实施要求相关，进口文件需体现法定进口方义务及机组级别的对应声明。
summary.zht: 泰國要求在市場准入前對列入目錄的電氣產品執行TISI符合性路徑。進入泰國銷售的空氣源熱泵及其空調形式通常需完成TISI符合性檢查並在要求時使用TIS符合性標識。相關安全基礎與TIS IEC 60335-2-40實施要求相關，進口文件需體現法定進口方義務及機組級別的對應聲明。

standards_or_laws: Thai Industrial Standards Institute (TISI) market pathways
TIS IEC 60335-2-40 (safety basis for heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers)
Thailand product safety and import documentation responsibilities

summary.en: China uses CCC and domestic GB pathways for China-market acceptance, including GB 4706.32 family safety documentation. These China domestic routes and marks are not accepted as TISI routes. Products with Chinese-only marks and declarations require conversion to Thailand-specific certification and responsibility mapping.
summary.zh: 中国采用CCC和中国GB体系进行中国市场放行，包括GB 4706.32系列安全文件。中国国内认证与标识不能替代TISI路径。带有仅中国标识和声明的产品需转为泰国特定认证并补齐责任主体映射。
summary.zht: 中國採用CCC和中國GB體系進行中國市場放行，包括GB 4706.32系列安全文件。中國國內認證與標識不能替代TISI路徑。帶有僅中國標識和聲明的產品需轉為泰國特定認證並補齊責任主體映射。

gap.en: The primary compliance gap is substitution risk: Chinese CCC and domestic declarations are not a route for TISI import entry. Exporters must secure the Thailand-specific product certification package, assign local responsible party support, and ensure all technical and labeling evidence is aligned with Thai import and inspection expectations.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于替代关系误判：中国CCC与国内声明不是TISI入境路径。出口商须确保获取泰国特定产品认证包、明确当地责任方支持，并确保所有技术与标签证据与泰国进口与监管要求一致。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於替代關係誤判：中國CCC與國內聲明不是TISI入境路徑。出口商必須確保取得泰國特定產品認證包、明確當地責任方支持，並確保所有技術與標籤證據與泰國進口與監管要求一致。

mandatory_status.cn: mandatory for China domestic import and sale route only; not equivalent in Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mandatory gap — CCC-style China-market certification cannot replace TISI product obligations in Thailand; Thailand-facing documentation and importer support must be prepared separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——中国CCC类国内认证不能替代泰国的TISI产品义务；须单独准备面向泰国市场的文件与进口方配合。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——中國CCC類國內認證不能替代泰國的TISI產品義務；須單獨準備面向泰國市場的文件與進口方配合。
